chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – Denying the evil by the heart

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/408)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/408)
text: كَانَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا مَرَّ بِجَمَاعَةٍ يَخْتَصِمُونَ لَمْ يَجُزْهُمْ حَتَّى يَقُولَ ثَلَاثاً اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ يَرْفَعُ بِهَا صَوْتَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from one of his companions, from Giyas Bin Ibrahim who said,

‘Whenever Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> used to pass by a group who were quarrelling, would not pass by then until he<sup>asws</sup> was saying three times: ‘Fear Allah<sup>azwj</sup>!’ - raising his<sup>asws</sup> voice with it’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali has narrated from his father from certain persons of his people from Ghiyath ibn Ibrahim who has said the following: “When seeing a quarrelling group of people abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would not pass by without always saying three times loudly, ‘You must maintain piety in the presence of Allah.’”
